infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Human listens to your voice to conduct the personality interview.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Human uses your microphone for the voice interview.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Human needs your location to find compatible people nearby.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Human needs background location to notify you when someone compatible is near.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Human needs your location to guide you toward your match.

plugins.photosPermission: Human needs access to your photos so you can add pictures to your profile.

plugins.localNetworkUsagePermissionText: Human uses local networking to detect when your match is nearby
